description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 20, 2025 at 2:33 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on E. 15th Street at S. Alameda Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing west on E. 15th Street for a red light at the intersection at S. Alameda Street with its right turn signal 
activated. The Waymo AV began to initiate a right turn and then came to a stop before entering S. Alameda Street. An SUV that was 
making a right turn directly behind the Waymo AV proceeded forward and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the stationary 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
